text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Eeek! It's Super Creek! Mommy, I'm scared!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Grrrr! I'll eat you up! ♪

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Eeeeep!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek's notoriety grows to rival Oguri Cap's
popularity.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
How are you feeling, Super Creek? What's your
outlook for the Arima Kinen?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Well, both Tamtam and Oguri are trying their
best, but they've still got a ways to go. ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
No matter how much they struggle, they won't
win. Hehehe, the world is mine. ♪

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
In all seriousness, how do you see the middle and
long-distance Nakayama races playing out?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Trainer, don't things seem strange to you lately?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'm doing my part to play the villain, but
everyone's so indifferent.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: What's going on?

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Look, it's Creek! Over there! See?

text_block_list.name: Boy B
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, you're right! She's so fast and strong!
Creeeeek!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Hello there!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: See what I mean?
choice_data_list: Maybe they're starting to see you differently.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: But why?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the beginning, she was simply Oguri Cap's rival.
But as she gets more exposure...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps people, both fans and non-fans alike, are
starting to see Super Creek for who she really is.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, how complicated. I don't mind being the
villain though. It's kind of fun.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'm happy as long as everyone is enjoying
themselves.
choice_data_list:
Maybe people want to see you in a different
role.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
A different role? You mean as something other
than a villain?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I'm not sure if I can just switch things up
on the fly.
choice_data_list:
I believe you already have another character up
your sleeve.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Another character? By that, do you mean...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone has begun to realize that Super Creek
doesn't have to act like a super athlete—because
she already is one.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The winds of change have started howling in the
lead-up to the end-of-year showdown.
